completed_tasks.notes: Required 3 attempts due to 3 latent infra bugs — all documented in runbook

completed_tasks.notes: companies: 5500, exit_code: 0, duration_ms: 2934665 (~49 min). ECS proven stable — no connection-drop issue.

human_actions_pending.action: Approve Step 6 (RDS removal) after coverage parity is confirmed
human_actions_pending.context: Irreversible — remove-aws-mdm-rds-after-cutover.sh. User has standing preference for checkpoint before every irreversible action.

decisions.decision: Run MDM data regeneration from ECS, not local laptop
decisions.rationale: Local batched runs would take ~15+ hours. ECS (same AWS network) has no connection-drop issue — company full run (5500 rows) completed in ~49 min unbatched. Offset-batching strategy is moot from ECS.

decisions.decision: Do NOT use the mdm-check-connectivity Step Functions state machine
decisions.rationale: It hardcodes a removed --neo4j flag (broken since commit 8784fd5 decommissioned Neo4j). Use ecs run-task directly with ['mdm','check-connectivity'] instead.

decisions.decision: Always re-resolve ECR image digests fresh immediately before deploy-aws-application.sh
decisions.rationale: The script's own ECR cleanup step deletes images matching non-sha-* tags — including the digest just resolved by the caller. Passing stale cached digests breaks the task definition. Always use 'aws ecr describe-images ... sort_by ... [-1]' freshly.

decisions.decision: Always pass --edgar-identity-secret-arn explicitly with live-looked-up ARN when redeploying
decisions.rationale: deploy-aws-application.sh prefers cached manifest ARN over live lookup. If secret was recreated (ARN suffix changed), the manifest caches the dead ARN. Pass --edgar-identity-secret-arn $(aws secretsmanager describe-secret --secret-id edgartools-dev-edgar-identity --query ARN --output text) explicitly.

decisions.decision: Discard --offset pagination code changes to pipeline.py/cli.py
decisions.rationale: Added to support local batched runs when a connection-drop timeout was hypothesised. ECS runs full domains unbatched without issue. Changes are uncommitted on mdm/snowflake-postgres-cutover-live — should be reverted before committing.

uncommitted_files: docs/aws-mdm-snowflake-postgres-cutover.md — 3 new known-issue sections with 5-whys root cause analyses
edgar_warehouse/mdm/cli.py — --offset CLI flag (recommend REVERT: unnecessary, ECS is unbatched)
edgar_warehouse/mdm/pipeline.py — offset parameter in run_* methods (recommend REVERT: same reason)
infra/aws-dev-application.json — updated manifest from latest redeploy (should be committed)
next_action: Check persons + securities ECS task status via 'aws ecs describe-tasks --region us-east-1 --cluster edgartools-dev-warehouse --tasks <arn> --query tasks[0].{status:lastStatus,exitCode:containers[0].exitCode}'. When both STOPPED exit_code=0, launch relationships run, then verify with mdm counts/coverage-report, then proceed to audit gate (Step 5).
context_notes: Three latent infra bugs found during deploy (stale secret ARN, ECR cleanup self-deletion, broken --neo4j flag in SFN). All documented with 5-whys in docs/aws-mdm-snowflake-postgres-cutover.md. ECS connectivity and full-domain population proven stable. Security and credential hygiene: never print plaintext passwords. /tmp/mdm-cutover-secrets/ contains working credential files (chmod 600).
